oxyde_corporate_war.name: Oxyde Corporate War
oxyde_corporate_war.description: Large-scale corporate war fought over control of industrial production and salvage rights in the Patina system.
oxyde_corporate_war.causes: Escalating competition between corporate fleets over orbital manufacturing capacity and logistics routes.
oxyde_corporate_war.outcome: Destruction of multiple orbital shipyards and the creation of the Patina wreckage belts and graveyard zones.
oxyde_corporate_war.historical_significance: Transformed the Patina system into a major salvage economy and long-term debris field.
